steps.title: Use weighted means
steps.content: For a frequency table, the mean is the weighted sum divided by the total frequency: $$\text{mean}=\frac{\sum(\text{value})(\text{frequency})}{\sum\text{frequency}}.$$ Since all four choices use the same values $70$, $80$, $90$, and $100$, compare their weighted means.

steps.title: Compare the four weighted means
steps.content: Choice A gives $$\frac{70(4)+80(5)+90(6)+100(7)}{4+5+6+7}=\frac{1920}{22}\approx87.27.$$ Choices B, C, and D each give $85$ because their frequencies are balanced around the midpoint between $80$ and $90$. The greatest mean is therefore choice A.
